- APP CHROME: Left sidebar is a floating white glass rail (SideNavBar) with abstract shape-based icons and compact navigation groups. Top header (TopAppBar) is a pill-shaped command center with search, status capsules, and account controls.
- BACKGROUND: Cinematic blurred hospital operations background with subtle floating capsules and abstract art layer.
- SECTION: 'Coverage & Guidelines'. 
- CONTENT: 
  - Tabs for: LCD/NCD Search, ICD to CPT Crosswalk, CPT to ICD Crosswalk, NCCI/Payer Checks, Certified Review.
  - Metrics: 'Active Policies', 'Verification Rate (98%)', 'Pending Reviews'.
  - Primary Workspace: High-density list/table showing real coding data (ICD M17.0 Bilateral Osteoarthritis, CPT 29877 Arthroscopy, NCCI Edit: Warning).
  - Side Insight Panel: 'CMS MCD Evidence' drawer previewing a specific payer policy for knee surgery.
  - Workflow: Confidence tags (95% AI Match), status badges (NPI Verified), and editorial headings.
- AESTHETIC: Bright premium healthcare SaaS. White pill surfaces, layered panels with gentle depth, navy text, orange and cobalt action buttons, mint/blue verification accents. Typography: Manrope/Inter.
- NO MARKETING CONTENT. THIS IS THE AUTHENTICATED APP.","name":"projects/4424618916363041938/screens/f9b842960243450dadc1f4c42f08c365","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","roundness":"ROUND_TWELVE","customColor":"#f47a45","headlineFont":"MANROPE","bodyFont":"INTER","labelFont":"INTER","designMd":"# Codical Reference-Level Landing System

Purpose: Create a Codical Health landing page that reaches or exceeds the polish level of the Automation SaaS/Nexsas reference at https://automation-saas-tailwind.vercel.app/. Use the reference for layout quality, page rhythm, hero scale, header behavior, product mockup depth, CTA style, and premium polish only. Do not copy Nexsas branding, exact assets, exact copy, or source code.

Product: Codical Health helps healthcare coding teams upload clinical reports, receive AI-assisted ICD/CPT/HCPCS suggestions, validate claims with NCCI/payer/NPI checks, and complete certified coder review in one professional workflow.

Design personality: bright, cinematic, spacious, premium SaaS, healthcare operations, clean editorial, confident. It should feel at least as expensive as the reference, with a healthcare-specific hero environment and real product UI.

Hero direction:
- Full-bleed scenic healthcare operations background, inspired by the reference's sky/mountain hero but translated to Codical: morning clinical campus, bright sky, glass medical operations center, or clean healthcare command environment.
- Floating pill header over the hero with logo, dropdown nav, and primary CTA.
- Huge centered headline, short readable subcopy, avatar proof row, two CTA pill buttons.
- Large Codical product mockup overlapping the hero bottom with soft fade into next section.
- Product mockup must show Codical-specific UI: claim validation workspace, CPT/ICD table, NCCI status, NPI verified, payer rule attached, coder invite/review action.

Page structure:
1. Header: logo, Platform, Solutions, Resources, Pricing, Request access CTA.
2. Hero: avatar proof, headline, subcopy, Start review workflow, Book demo/See process, product mockup.
3. Editorial about section: healthcare team image, large heading, short copy, stats.
4. Results/features: four premium cards with custom mini visuals for Code Intelligence, Claim Validation, Payer/NCCI Intelligence, Certified Review.
5. Workflow/process: four steps Upload report, Coding suggestions, Validate claim, Certified coder review.
6. Product depth/integrations: connected healthcare ecosystem CMS, NPI/NPPES, payer policy, clearinghouse, EHR.
7. FAQ/final CTA/footer.

Visual tokens:
- Light fog background: #edf4fb, #f7fbff, #ffffff.
- Text: #101828, #17213a, muted #65758b.
- Codical navy: #071252.
- Codical blue: #1238db.
- Codical orange: #ff7a3d / #f47a45.
- Optional electric CTA accent: #c8ff55 used sparingly like the reference, but Codical orange can remain primary.
- Cards: white glass, soft shadows, large but disciplined radii, premium depth.
- Header: white pill with black/dark CTA body and colored circular icon segment.

Responsive requirements:
- Mobile must improve on the reference by avoiding horizontal clipping.
- Headline wraps cleanly at 390px.
- CTAs stack cleanly.
- Product mockup scales without overflow.
- Mobile menu open and closed states should be designed.

Motion notes:
- Slow hero background parallax.
- Product mockup floats/fades in.
- CTA icon hover slide.
- Header blur/shadow on scroll.
- Subtle section reveal.
- Reduced-motion static fallback.","colorVariant":"EXPRESSIVE","overridePrimaryColor":"#f47a45","overrideSecondaryColor":"#1238db","overrideTertiaryColor":"#c8ff55","overrideNeutralColor":"#edf4fb"},"deviceType":"DESKTOP","screenType":"DESIGN","screenMetadata":{"agentType":"PRO_AGENT","status":"COMPLETE"},"designSystem":{"name":"assets/7171876461624600483","designSystem":{"displayName":"Codical Reference-Level Landing System","theme":{"colorMode":"LIGHT","roundness":"ROUND_TWELVE","customColor":"#f47a45","headlineFont":"MANROPE","bodyFont":"INTER","labelFont":"INTER","designMd":"# Codical Reference-Level Landing System

### Design Highlights:
- **Authenticated Chrome**: The sidebar has been reimagined as a floating "glass rail" with modern shape-based icons and grouped navigation, providing a compact yet high-end navigation experience.
- **Command-Center Header**: The top bar uses a pill-shaped layout to house the search/command area and real-time status capsules, maintaining the "floating surface" motif.
- **High-Fidelity Workspace**: The main content area focuses on the "Coverage & Guidelines" section, featuring real medical coding data (ICD M17.0, CPT 29877) with layered cards, confidence matching tags, and clinical evidence side panels.
- **Visual Depth**: I've preserved the cinematic blurred background and abstract motion layers while ensuring the UI components—built on white pill surfaces—remain sharp and highly readable.
- **Workflow-Ready**: The interface includes specific validation states like NCCI warnings, NPI verification badges, and a policy evidence drawer, all styled with the established cobalt, orange, and mint palette.

This concept serves as a comprehensive visual guide for implementing the core application shell and complex data-driven workspaces. How does the balance between the abstract background and the data-heavy workspace feel to you?"},{"suggestion":"Show the 'Claims Queue' workspace in this same style"},{"suggestion":"Add a detailed 'Evidence Drawer' expansion for a policy match"},{"suggestion":"Create a dark mode variant for the authenticated dashboard"}]}

theme.designMd:
# Codical Reference-Level Landing System

Purpose: Create a Codical Health landing page that reaches or exceeds the polish level of the Automation SaaS/Nexsas reference at https://automation-saas-tailwind.vercel.app/. Use the reference for layout quality, page rhythm, hero scale, header behavior, product mockup depth, CTA style, and premium polish only. Do not copy Nexsas branding, exact assets, exact copy, or source code.

Product: Codical Health helps healthcare coding teams upload clinical reports, receive AI-assisted ICD/CPT/HCPCS suggestions, validate claims with NCCI/payer/NPI checks, and complete certified coder review in one professional workflow.

Design personality: bright, cinematic, spacious, premium SaaS, healthcare operations, clean editorial, confident. It should feel at least as expensive as the reference, with a healthcare-specific hero environment and real product UI.

Hero direction:
- Full-bleed scenic healthcare operations background, inspired by the reference's sky/mountain hero but translated to Codical: morning clinical campus, bright sky, glass medical operations center, or clean healthcare command environment.
- Floating pill header over the hero with logo, dropdown nav, and primary CTA.
- Huge centered headline, short readable subcopy, avatar proof row, two CTA pill buttons.
- Large Codical product mockup overlapping the hero bottom with soft fade into next section.
- Product mockup must show Codical-specific UI: claim validation workspace, CPT/ICD table, NCCI status, NPI verified, payer rule attached, coder invite/review action.

Page structure:
1. Header: logo, Platform, Solutions, Resources, Pricing, Request access CTA.
2. Hero: avatar proof, headline, subcopy, Start review workflow, Book demo/See process, product mockup.
3. Editorial about section: healthcare team image, large heading, short copy, stats.
4. Results/features: four premium cards with custom mini visuals for Code Intelligence, Claim Validation, Payer/NCCI Intelligence, Certified Review.
5. Workflow/process: four steps Upload report, Coding suggestions, Validate claim, Certified coder review.
6. Product depth/integrations: connected healthcare ecosystem CMS, NPI/NPPES, payer policy, clearinghouse, EHR.
7. FAQ/final CTA/footer.

Visual tokens:
- Light fog background: #edf4fb, #f7fbff, #ffffff.
- Text: #101828, #17213a, muted #65758b.
- Codical navy: #071252.
- Codical blue: #1238db.
- Codical orange: #ff7a3d / #f47a45.
- Optional electric CTA accent: #c8ff55 used sparingly like the reference, but Codical orange can remain primary.
- Cards: white glass, soft shadows, large but disciplined radii, premium depth.
- Header: white pill with black/dark CTA body and colored circular icon segment.

Responsive requirements:
- Mobile must improve on the reference by avoiding horizontal clipping.
- Headline wraps cleanly at 390px.
- CTAs stack cleanly.
- Product mockup scales without overflow.
- Mobile menu open and closed states should be designed.

Motion notes:
- Slow hero background parallax.
- Product mockup floats/fades in.
- CTA icon hover slide.
- Header blur/shadow on scroll.
- Subtle section reveal.
- Reduced-motion static fallback.

screens.name: projects/4424618916363041938/screens/f9b842960243450dadc1f4c42f08c365
screens.prompt:
An authenticated desktop dashboard for Codical Health (1440x1000). 
- APP CHROME: Left sidebar is a floating white glass rail (SideNavBar) with abstract shape-based icons and compact navigation groups. Top header (TopAppBar) is a pill-shaped command center with search, status capsules, and account controls.
- BACKGROUND: Cinematic blurred hospital operations background with subtle floating capsules and abstract art layer.
- SECTION: 'Coverage & Guidelines'. 
- CONTENT: 
  - Tabs for: LCD/NCD Search, ICD to CPT Crosswalk, CPT to ICD Crosswalk, NCCI/Payer Checks, Certified Review.
  - Metrics: 'Active Policies', 'Verification Rate (98%)', 'Pending Reviews'.
  - Primary Workspace: High-density list/table showing real coding data (ICD M17.0 Bilateral Osteoarthritis, CPT 29877 Arthroscopy, NCCI Edit: Warning).
  - Side Insight Panel: 'CMS MCD Evidence' drawer previewing a specific payer policy for knee surgery.
  - Workflow: Confidence tags (95% AI Match), status badges (NPI Verified), and editorial headings.
- AESTHETIC: Bright premium healthcare SaaS. White pill surfaces, layered panels with gentle depth, navy text, orange and cobalt action buttons, mint/blue verification accents. Typography: Manrope/Inter.
- NO MARKETING CONTENT. THIS IS THE AUTHENTICATED APP.

# Codical Reference-Level Landing System

Purpose: Create a Codical Health landing page that reaches or exceeds the polish level of the Automation SaaS/Nexsas reference at https://automation-saas-tailwind.vercel.app/. Use the reference for layout quality, page rhythm, hero scale, header behavior, product mockup depth, CTA style, and premium polish only. Do not copy Nexsas branding, exact assets, exact copy, or source code.

Product: Codical Health helps healthcare coding teams upload clinical reports, receive AI-assisted ICD/CPT/HCPCS suggestions, validate claims with NCCI/payer/NPI checks, and complete certified coder review in one professional workflow.

Design personality: bright, cinematic, spacious, premium SaaS, healthcare operations, clean editorial, confident. It should feel at least as expensive as the reference, with a healthcare-specific hero environment and real product UI.

Hero direction:
- Full-bleed scenic healthcare operations background, inspired by the reference's sky/mountain hero but translated to Codical: morning clinical campus, bright sky, glass medical operations center, or clean healthcare command environment.
- Floating pill header over the hero with logo, dropdown nav, and primary CTA.
- Huge centered headline, short readable subcopy, avatar proof row, two CTA pill buttons.
- Large Codical product mockup overlapping the hero bottom with soft fade into next section.
- Product mockup must show Codical-specific UI: claim validation workspace, CPT/ICD table, NCCI status, NPI verified, payer rule attached, coder invite/review action.

Page structure:
1. Header: logo, Platform, Solutions, Resources, Pricing, Request access CTA.
2. Hero: avatar proof, headline, subcopy, Start review workflow, Book demo/See process, product mockup.
3. Editorial about section: healthcare team image, large heading, short copy, stats.
4. Results/features: four premium cards with custom mini visuals for Code Intelligence, Claim Validation, Payer/NCCI Intelligence, Certified Review.
5. Workflow/process: four steps Upload report, Coding suggestions, Validate claim, Certified coder review.
6. Product depth/integrations: connected healthcare ecosystem CMS, NPI/NPPES, payer policy, clearinghouse, EHR.
7. FAQ/final CTA/footer.

Visual tokens:

- Headline wraps cleanly at 390px.
- CTAs stack cleanly.
- Product mockup scales without overflow.
- Mobile menu open and closed states should be designed.

Motion notes:

- Product mockup floats/fades in.
- CTA icon hover slide.
- Header blur/shadow on scroll.
- Subtle section reveal.
- Reduced-motion static fallback.

screens.title: Codical Health - Coverage & Guidelines Workspace

outputComponents.text:
I've designed the authenticated "Coverage & Guidelines" dashboard for Codical Health, bringing the premium landing page aesthetic into the product interface.

### Design Highlights:
- **Authenticated Chrome**: The sidebar has been reimagined as a floating "glass rail" with modern shape-based icons and grouped navigation, providing a compact yet high-end navigation experience.
- **Command-Center Header**: The top bar uses a pill-shaped layout to house the search/command area and real-time status capsules, maintaining the "floating surface" motif.
- **High-Fidelity Workspace**: The main content area focuses on the "Coverage & Guidelines" section, featuring real medical coding data (ICD M17.0, CPT 29877) with layered cards, confidence matching tags, and clinical evidence side panels.
- **Visual Depth**: I've preserved the cinematic blurred background and abstract motion layers while ensuring the UI components—built on white pill surfaces—remain sharp and highly readable.
- **Workflow-Ready**: The interface includes specific validation states like NCCI warnings, NPI verification badges, and a policy evidence drawer, all styled with the established cobalt, orange, and mint palette.

This concept serves as a comprehensive visual guide for implementing the core application shell and complex data-driven workspaces. How does the balance between the abstract background and the data-heavy workspace feel to you?

outputComponents.suggestion: Show the 'Claims Queue' workspace in this same style
Add a detailed 'Evidence Drawer' expansion for a policy match
Create a dark mode variant for the authenticated dashboard
